---
title: "Data Cleaning Checklist"
author: "Jason Entingh"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: html_document
---

# setup

## markdown setup

```{r setup_markdown, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

## library

```{r setup_library}
library(tidyverse)
library(readxl)
library(writexl)
library(nycflights13)
```

# import

## import from csv

```{r import_csv}



```


## import from xlsx

# cleaning

## duplicates

```{r cleaning_duplicates}

# get summary of duplicates
your_data |> 
  count(var1) |> 
  filter(n > 1)

# find duplicates based on variables
your_data |> 
  group_by(var1, var2) |> 
  filter(n() > 1)

# remove duplicates
your_data |> 
  distinct(var1, var2, .keep_all = TRUE)



```


# visualize

# export
